description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a matte dark green body and black attachments. It is equipped with a prominent telescopic scope mounted on the top rail, suggesting it is intended for precision shooting. The barrel is long and fitted with a large cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle, enhancing stealth capabilities. The stock is solid and straight, providing stability, while the pistol grip and trigger guard are clearly defined for ergonomic handling. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, integrated into the lower receiver. The overall construction suggests a modern tactical sniper or marksman rifle suitable for urban operations.
description: A modern, dark green tactical rifle with a scope, suppressor, and detachable box magazine, designed for precision and stealth.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, scope, suppressor, and magazine details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor and barrel alignment, with the scope visible above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, scope, and suppressor, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the scope, barrel, and overall linear structure.
